message:
refactor: extract resolveTarget and hookBeadWithRetry to eliminate sling dispatch duplication (gt-8gvrz)

- Extract resolveTarget() into sling_target.go: unified dispatch for self, dog,
  rig (auto-spawn polecat), and existing agent targets with dead polecat fallback.
  Eliminates 3x duplication across sling.go, sling_formula.go, sling_batch.go.
- Extract hookBeadWithRetry() into sling_helpers.go: 10-attempt exponential backoff
  with verification, replacing inconsistent single-attempt hooks in formula/batch.
- Move slingBackoff() to sling_helpers.go alongside hookBeadWithRetry.
- Fix sling_formula.go: add StartSession() for rig-spawned polecats (was missing,
  session never started for formula-to-rig slings).

files.patch:
@@ -2,8 +2,6 @@ package cmd
 
 import (
 	"fmt"
-	"os"
-	"os/exec"
 	"path/filepath"
 	"time"
 
@@ -160,11 +158,9 @@ func runBatchSling(beadIDs []string, rigName string, townBeadsDir string) error
 			}
 		}
 
-		// Hook the bead (or wisp compound if formula was applied)
-		hookCmd := exec.Command("bd", "--no-daemon", "update", beadToHook, "--status=hooked", "--assignee="+targetAgent)
-		hookCmd.Dir = beads.ResolveHookDir(townRoot, beadToHook, hookWorkDir)
-		hookCmd.Stderr = os.Stderr
-		if err := hookCmd.Run(); err != nil {
+		// Hook the bead (or wisp compound if formula was applied) with retry
+		hookDir := beads.ResolveHookDir(townRoot, beadToHook, hookWorkDir)
+		if err := hookBeadWithRetry(beadToHook, targetAgent, hookDir); err != nil {
 			results = append(results, slingResult{beadID: beadID, polecat: spawnInfo.PolecatName, success: false, errMsg: "hook failed"})
 			fmt.Printf("  %s Failed to hook bead: %v\n", style.Dim.Render("✗"), err)
 			// Clean up orphaned polecat to avoid leaving spawned-but-unhookable polecats
